query: fluorescent green tinted hospital corridor cold light photograph
message: anti-aesthetic / color_and_tone / sickly_cast — fluorescent cold/green clinical tints, institutional cast

response.objective_caption: A nighttime photograph of a contemporary multi-story building with a prominent cylindrical glass tower illuminated in vivid blue light running vertically along one corner. The building features horizontal bands of dark-tinted windows with warm interior lights visible on several floors. In the foreground, a vehicle with illuminated rear lights travels along a curved paved road bordered by short concrete bollards and orange-and-white traffic cones. Several tall street lamps cast pools of warm yellow light onto the roadway and sidewalk. The scene is set against a dark night sky, with faint lights visible in the distant background.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A nighttime photograph of a contemporary multi-story building with a prominent cylindrical glass tower illuminated in vivid blue light, captured with a steeply tilted angle that renders the building's vertical lines on a strong diagonal. The building features horizontal bands of dark-tinted windows. In the foreground, motion blur softens a vehicle with glowing red taillights as it travels along a curved paved road bordered by short concrete bollards and orange-and-white traffic cones. Several tall street lamps cast pools of warm yellow light onto the roadway. The unconventional framing and motion blur create a dynamic, unstable composition against the dark night sky.
